comment: Focused corpus for the set-adjacent regime (2026-07-07 direction): direct pathway, zoom < 40, >25k iterations, tiles dominated by exterior pixels escaping at high-but-not-max counts, with some interior mixed in. Compositions from 100x100 probes (scratchpad probe.mjs, 2026-07-07). hi-trapped kept as a pure-throughput regression control.

cases.note: One tile above the reported point: ~12% interior, escapers mean ~1.8k / max ~50k — escaper-band anchor, heterogeneous escape counts
3/4 tile right of the reported point: high-escape band (escaper p90 ~6.6k, max ~51k) beside interior blob (~69%)
East of the rep minibrot at z39: 44% interior, escapers mean ~6.7k, p90 ~16.7k, 10% of pixels >10k — most near-max-escaper-dominated tile found
North edge of the rep minibrot at z38: ~90% interior + escaper tail mean ~11k / p90 ~28k — 'some inside is fine' case
Seahorse spiral, 0% interior, escapers mean ~1.1k: every pixel escapes, measures per-iteration throughput + any check overhead
Seahorse valley: ~33% cardioid/bulb interior walls + slow-escape channel with set-adjacent escapers up to ~46k
Cusp channel d=1e-6: since 78ec740 this resolves instantly via rect_in_set + border periodicity — kept as a fast-path regression control
